{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Supervisor",
  "description": "Grant Thornton is a leading business adviser that helps dynamic organizations to unlock their potential for growth. Our brand is respected globally, as one of the major global accounting organisations recognized by capital markets, regulators and international standards-setting bodies. Over the last three years, we are the fastest-growing large accounting organisation and we are constantly evolving and developing alongside our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos

Key responsibilities


	Participate in the development of the firms I.T strategy and annual budgets
	Promptly and efficiently resolve hardware and software technology issues within the firm to prevent impedance to operations.
	Liaise with relevant vendors and service providers in managing, maximizing and maintaining business equipment and facilities within the various. locations of the firm nationwide.
	Perform installations, and maintenance of computer hardware and software.
	Maintain and administer the server. Develop and manage website to meet current business challenges.&nbsp;


Qualifications &amp; Personal Attributes


	A bachelor&rsquo;s degree or a Diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Proven experience as an IT Administrator or similar role.
	Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 and Azure environments.
	Experience with Intune, Azure DevOps, and other IT management tools.
	Solid understanding of network infrastructure and firewall management.
	Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

IT Supervisor Job at Grant Thornton




        
    

        
        Grant Thornton is a leading business adviser that helps dynamic organizations to unlock their potential for growth. Our brand is respected globally, as one of the major global accounting organisations recognized by capital markets, regulators and international standards-setting bodies. Over the last three years, we are the fastest-growing large accounting organisation and we are constantly evolving and developing alongside our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos

Key responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Participate in the development of the firms I.T strategy and annual budgets
	Promptly and efficiently resolve hardware and software technology issues within the firm to prevent impedance to operations.
	Liaise with relevant vendors and service providers in managing, maximizing and maintaining business equipment and facilities within the various. locations of the firm nationwide.
	Perform installations, and maintenance of computer hardware and software.
	Maintain and administer the server. Develop and manage website to meet current business challenges. 


Qualifications & Personal Attributes


	A bachelor’s degree or a Diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Proven experience as an IT Administrator or similar role.
	Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 and Azure environments.
	Experience with Intune, Azure DevOps, and other IT management tools.
	Solid understanding of network infrastructure and firewall management.
	Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Laravel Developer",
  "description": "Goodnews Consulting is an Human Resource Consulting firm which provides recruitment and outsourcing services to clients ensuring they have a suitable workforce that works to achieve the goal of the employer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Laravel Developer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Job Mode: Hybrid work model (2 days onsite)

About the Role


	We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer with strong experience in PHP (Laravel) to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for building, maintaining, and improving web applications that deliver excellent user experiences and robust backend performance.
	This is a six months contract base role with possibilities of renewal and conversion depending on performance.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, test, and deploy scalable web applications using Laravel framework.
	Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and other external services.
	Build and enhance responsive front-end interfaces with modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js or React).
	Manage database structures, migrations, and optimization
	Architect and implement scalable solutions, ensuring optimal performance and maintainability.
	Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
	Maintain and refactor existing codebases to improve performance and security.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade systems when necessary.
	Lead code reviews, enforce coding standards, and ensure adherence to best practices.
	Conduct technical feasibility assessments for new product features and improvements.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and proactively recommend improvements to enhance product scalability and user experience.
	Participate in technical decision-making and contribute to the overall product roadmap from a development perspective


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
	Minimum of 2 proven years of professional experience in full stack web development.
	Strong proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap/Tailwind CSS.
	Experience with Vue.js or React.js frameworks.
	Good understanding of software architecture, security practices, and deployment pipelines.
	Knowledge of unit testing
	Familiarity with cloud services (AWS, DigitalOcean, or similar) and containerization (Docker) is a plus.
	Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and web security best practices.
	Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and make sound technical decisions in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and link to their portfolio to: humanresources@bullionsms.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-07",

Laravel Developer Job at Goodnews Consulting




        
    

        
        Goodnews Consulting is an Human Resource Consulting firm which provides recruitment and outsourcing services to clients ensuring they have a suitable workforce that works to achieve the goal of the employer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Laravel Developer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Job Mode: Hybrid work model (2 days onsite)

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer with strong experience in PHP (Laravel) to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for building, maintaining, and improving web applications that deliver excellent user experiences and robust backend performance.
	This is a six months contract base role with possibilities of renewal and conversion depending on performance.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, test, and deploy scalable web applications using Laravel framework.
	Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and other external services.
	Build and enhance responsive front-end interfaces with modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js or React).
	Manage database structures, migrations, and optimization
	Architect and implement scalable solutions, ensuring optimal performance and maintainability.
	Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
	Maintain and refactor existing codebases to improve performance and security.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade systems when necessary.
	Lead code reviews, enforce coding standards, and ensure adherence to best practices.
	Conduct technical feasibility assessments for new product features and improvements.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and proactively recommend improvements to enhance product scalability and user experience.
	Participate in technical decision-making and contribute to the overall product roadmap from a development perspective


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
	Minimum of 2 proven years of professional experience in full stack web development.
	Strong proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap/Tailwind CSS.
	Experience with Vue.js or React.js frameworks.
	Good understanding of software architecture, security practices, and deployment pipelines.
	Knowledge of unit testing
	Familiarity with cloud services (AWS, DigitalOcean, or similar) and containerization (Docker) is a plus.
	Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and web security best practices.
	Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and make sound technical decisions in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and link to their portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Service Officer Job at Medife Limited




        
    

        
        Medife Limited - Our client, Kuddy Cosmetics is one of Nigeria’s oldest and most trusted names in beauty. From our stores across Lagos, we distribute and retail authentic makeup, skincare, and haircare products, carrying leading international and Nigerian brands as well as our own line.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To deliver exceptional customer service by managing online customer interactions, processing orders, ensuring proper packaging and dispatch, and maintaining Kuddy Cosmetics’ reputation for quality and professionalism across digital platforms.


Job Responsibilities
Online Customer Management:


	Respond promptly to customer inquiries via WhatsApp, TikTok, and Instagram messages.
	Provide accurate product information and skincare guidance.
	Handle difficult customers with patience, empathy, and professionalism.


Order Processing:


	Attend to online orders efficiently.
	Ensure goods are properly packaged and dispatched on time.
	Track deliveries and resolve order?related issues.


Customer Engagement:


	Build strong relationships with customers to encourage repeat business.
	Promote Kuddy Cosmetics’ skincare products with enthusiasm and product knowledge.
	Maintain a positive brand image in all communications.


Communication Excellence:


	Demonstrate exceptional phone etiquette in all calls.
	Speak correct and fluent English; ability to speak other Nigerian languages is an advantage.
	Ensure timely, professional, and courteous responses across all channels.


Qualifications & Skills


	Prior experience in customer service, preferably in retail or cosmetics.
	Strong interest in skincare and beauty products.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to manage challenging customer situations calmly.
	Proficiency in using social media platforms for business communication.
	Organizational skills to handle multiple orders and inquiries simultaneously.
	Candidates MUST stay within close proximity to Tradfair.
	Only candidates who stay close will be contacted.


Work Environment:


	Full time In-person based in Lagos, Nigeria.
	Fast?paced environment requiring multitasking and attention to detail.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Site Engineer",
  "description": "HR-on-Wheels is a Human Resource consulting firm with focus to add value to the businesses of SMEs by emphazing the need to have a people strategy in place.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and monitor construction activities on-site to ensure projects are executed according to approved plans and specifications
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, subcontractors, and project teams to ensure smooth project delivery
	Conduct site inspections and ensure compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards
	Prepare site reports, progress updates, and technical documentation
	Monitor project timelines and assist in ensuring projects are completed within schedule and budget
	Review drawings and resolve technical issues that may arise during construction
	Manage site resources, materials, and equipment efficiently
	Ensure adherence to health and safety regulations at all times


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Civil Engineering, Building Technology, or a related field
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in construction site supervision and project execution
	Strong knowledge of construction methods, site management, and quality control processes Ability to read and interpret construction drawings and technical specifications
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Microsoft Office Suite, and other relevant tools
	Excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational skills
	Professional certification is an added advantage


Salary
N500,000 per month.&nbsp;",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-15",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

    "currency": "NGN",

      "minValue": 400000,
      "maxValue": 600000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Site Engineer Job at HR-on-Wheels




        
    

        
        HR-on-Wheels is a Human Resource consulting firm with focus to add value to the businesses of SMEs by emphazing the need to have a people strategy in place.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise and monitor construction activities on-site to ensure projects are executed according to approved plans and specifications
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, subcontractors, and project teams to ensure smooth project delivery
	Conduct site inspections and ensure compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards
	Prepare site reports, progress updates, and technical documentation
	Monitor project timelines and assist in ensuring projects are completed within schedule and budget
	Review drawings and resolve technical issues that may arise during construction
	Manage site resources, materials, and equipment efficiently
	Ensure adherence to health and safety regulations at all times


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering, Building Technology, or a related field
	3–5 years of experience in construction site supervision and project execution
	Strong knowledge of construction methods, site management, and quality control processes Ability to read and interpret construction drawings and technical specifications
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Microsoft Office Suite, and other relevant tools
	Excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational skills
	Professional certification is an added advantage


Salary
N500,000 per month.     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Corporate Sales & Marketing Executive",
  "description": "ValueMart is a fast-growing neighborhood supermarket committed to providing families and individuals with a convenient, reliable, and affordable shopping experience. Located in Lagos, ValueMart offers a well-curated selection of essential goods ranging from groceries, beverages, household items, toiletries, cosmetics, baby products, fresh produce, snacks, and more.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Corporate Sales &amp; Marketing Executive
Job Location: Utako / Wuye - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new corporate business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients and partners
	Promote the company&#39;s products, services, events, and catering offerings
	Develop and execute sales and marketing strategies to achieve revenue targets
	Prepare and deliver sales presentations, proposals, and contracts
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis
	Manage corporate accounts and ensure high customer satisfaction
	Coordinate promotional campaigns and brand activation activities
	Generate regular sales and marketing reports


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in sales, marketing, or business development
	Experience in hospitality, food service, FMCG, or retail is an added advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills
	Proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and digital marketing tools ? Self-motivated, proactive, and results-oriented


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@valuemartdc.com using &quot;Corporate Sales &amp; Marketing Executive&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Corporate Sales & Marketing Executive Job at ValueMart




        
    

        
        ValueMart is a fast-growing neighborhood supermarket committed to providing families and individuals with a convenient, reliable, and affordable shopping experience. Located in Lagos, ValueMart offers a well-curated selection of essential goods ranging from groceries, beverages, household items, toiletries, cosmetics, baby products, fresh produce, snacks, and more.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Corporate Sales & Marketing Executive
Job Location: Utako / Wuye - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and develop new corporate business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients and partners
	Promote the company's products, services, events, and catering offerings
	Develop and execute sales and marketing strategies to achieve revenue targets
	Prepare and deliver sales presentations, proposals, and contracts
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis
	Manage corporate accounts and ensure high customer satisfaction
	Coordinate promotional campaigns and brand activation activities
	Generate regular sales and marketing reports


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in sales, marketing, or business development
	Experience in hospitality, food service, FMCG, or retail is an added advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills
	Proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and digital marketing tools ? Self-motivated, proactive, and results-oriented


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Corporate Sales & Marketing Executive" as the subject of the mail.
